j=function(...)return v(M,{...},f,t)end return j end,function(M,f)local t=J(f)local j=function()return v(M,{},f,t)end return j end,function(v,j,I,n)local FU={}local if v<7138650-(-188232)then if v<7543709-523172 then if v<-714597+7349464 then if v<6589691-50262 then q=X[F]x=q v=q and-320972+9966967 or 85135+2999320 else J=-439907-(-439954)v=568995+4478032
